query:
-- Buscar agendamentos para mapear corretores antigos por email
SELECT DISTINCT
  a.corretorId as old_corretor_id,
  a.corretorEmail,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.leadId) as leads_agendados
FROM agendamentos a
WHERE a.corretorId IN (5053030, 6600095, 6851110, 4236243, 5052575, 4236208, 6621455, 6183990, 6399794, 7435908, 6600098)
GROUP BY a.corretorId, a.corretorEmail
ORDER BY leads_agendados DESC;
